description: You are a Data Engineer tasked with restoring a database from a legacy flat-file backup. Normalize the denormalized sales data from /home/ga/Documents/imports/legacy_sales_dump.csv into a new SQLite database at /home/ga/Documents/databases/northwind_restored.db. The database must contain four normalized tables with the following exact names and primary keys: Customers (CustomerID), Products (ProductID), Orders (OrderID, preserving the LegacyOrderID from the CSV), and OrderItems (OrderItemID, with Foreign Keys to Orders and Products). Ensure the row count in OrderItems matches the source CSV. Export a verification report to /home/ga/Documents/exports/restoration_check.csv containing CustomerName and TotalRevenue (calculated as Quantity * UnitPrice), sorted by revenue descending.
